violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The prep cooler by the pizza ovens had products temping between 47 and 57 degrees. The temp of sour cream packets from the bottom was 54 degrees. The air temp in the bottom of the unit was 55 degrees. This unit is not maintaining temperature below 41 degrees.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. The wake fast breakfast bowls and burritos in the front display case were not dated.
